summary: High‑quality matrix capture of a stellar show, with the standout Let It Grow shining through.
review: The half‑track reel transfer is praised for its clarity and balance, though listeners note an unusually heavy crowd mix compared to other SBD versions. Musically the concert is described as “stellar” and the performance of Let It Grow is singled out as a personal favorite, indicating an exceptional night despite the unknown date.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments about both performance and transfer quality (70% show weight) offset by limited detail on recording specifics (30% weight).

recording_quality.technical_notes: Half‑track reel-to-reel source transferred cleanly; reviewers note more crowd than typical SBD mixes, suggesting a matrix blend. No major audio flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; overall performance described as “stellar” and highly enjoyable.
